heading: Injury to submarine cables in efforts to save life excepted
label: 23 Injury to submarine cables in efforts to save life excepted
text: The provisions of sections 21 and 22 of this title shall not apply to a person who breaks or injures a cable in an effort to save the life or limb of himself or of any other person, or to save his own or any other vessel: , That he takes reasonable precautions to avoid such breaking or injury.Provided
